label: New
items: The Nursery — a new home for seed packets inside The Shed. Add packets manually, paste a list, or point your phone at a packet and let Rhozly AI extract the variety, vendor, sow-by date and quantity for you.
Seasonal Picks — a fresh "What to grow this week" card on the Dashboard and Quick Access menu, refreshed weekly from your hardiness zone and the time of year.
Chat-suggested Plans — when Plant Doctor Chat spots you researching a project (a few different plants in a row), it now offers to bundle them into a Plan in the Planner with one tap.
Grow Guide steps now ride along with calendar tasks — when you add a section to the calendar, the how-to checklist comes with it, so the reminder is self-sufficient days later.

label: Faster + more reliable
items: Local-first Dashboard — the dashboard now paints instantly on cold open from a local snapshot, then revalidates in the background. Yesterday's tasks, plants and weather are still readable offline.

Loading reliability rewrite — every critical query (profile, dashboard, quiz, locations, weather) now retries on transient failures, times out cleanly, and waits for the network to come back instead of erroring on a momentary blip.
Update banner rewrite — when a new version is live, the banner now appears reliably and auto-reloads after a 10-second countdown. Tap "Not now" to pick your moment instead.
Garden quiz no longer prompts you to retake it after a flaky network read.

label: Polish
items: Quick Access menu tightened up — bigger hero, 2×2 launcher tiles, and Seasonal Picks now shows one at a time with prev/next chevrons.
Plant Doctor Chat — clearer plan-suggestion card, better follow-up prompts.
Library — instant plant opens, cached search results, and reliable thumbnails across providers.
Garden zones — softer quick actions and tidier zone-properties sheet.
